observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, p5 creative-coding probes, Remotion timeline code, Manim explainer stubs, TouchDesigner/twozero local-network handoffs, browser-native demos, and repo-local skill packages. Creators still need a printable process surface that keeps capsule memory, proof, public boundary, and remix rules portable when collaborators are away from the browser.
population: creator capsule print/export surface mutations for portable process handoffs and externally-rendered creator workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into a printable or handoff-ready artifact faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, remix discipline, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the repo-local creator skill package into a reviewed external release checklist with install smoke, versioning, and rollback.
candidates.phenotype: Release contract and smoke script pending a reviewed registry target
candidates.risk: Could accidentally sync an unreviewed skill into live agents or publish private workflow assumptions.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into three public-safe colorway proofs so a creator can choose a remix direction before regenerating the final artifact.
candidates.phenotype: Deterministic colorway JSON plus fixed-canvas comparison sheet, deferred until two surfaces need the same palette proof
candidates.risk: Can become a palette dashboard unless it directly selects the next artifact mutation and blocks unsafe/raw reference inputs.

candidates.mutation: Add a unified regression orchestration command (bun creator:regression) that runs all 10 surface checks + mutation-check + hackathon:score in one pass, producing a single creator-useful regression report for Darwin loop evaluation.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-check.ts that calls each surface check sequentially, aggregates PASS/FAIL into a single report with timing and surface coverage, and gates on all surfaces passing
candidates.risk: Must stay compatible as new surfaces are added; must not hide individual surface failures behind aggregate PASS. Should emit per-surface results before the aggregate verdict.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)

retention: Retain creator-pdf-zine-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to a printable process artifact. Promoted from active candidate to retained_routes after winning selection across PRs #32-#36 with standardized vision QA, DOM verification, and creator-usefulness proof. Retain creator-touchdesigner-vision-qa-route (PR #42) as the completion of standardized vision QA coverage across all 10 creator surfaces. Current selected winner is creator-skill-release-route: external skill release checklist with install smoke, versioning, and rollback.
